/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/scheduler_server.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/scheduler_server.dir/src/task.cpp.o CMakeFiles/scheduler_server.dir/src/dag_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/scheduler_server.dir/src/heap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/scheduler_server.dir/src/scheduler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/scheduler_server.dir/src/report.cpp.o CMakeFiles/scheduler_server.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o scheduler_server  -lpthread
